recipes.name: Earnings Reviewer
recipes.description: Review public earnings materials for a company or ticker, then save a sourced research report with finance guardrails and human-review language.

recipes.name: Month-End Close Assistant
recipes.description: Turn exported close data into a human-reviewed close checklist, exception register, reconciliation checks, and follow-up plan.

recipes.name: GL Reconciliation Reviewer
recipes.description: Review exported ledger or reconciliation rows for unmatched items, duplicates, timing differences, outliers, and missing support.

recipes.name: Cashflow Snapshot
recipes.description: Summarize exported cash activity into inflow/outflow themes, pressure points, watch items, and operator follow-ups.
